zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Thompson於1598年1月21日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾沃爾頓時，她的父親Ralph Thompson39歲，母親Elizabeth Harsnett28歲。她於1617年與Capt. William Tucker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州加斯托結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1640年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州伊麗莎白 希迪享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Thompson于1598年1月21日出生在英国英格兰賀福爾沃爾頓时，她的父亲Ralph Thompson39岁，母亲Elizabeth Harsnett28岁。她于1617年与Capt. William Tucker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州加斯托结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1640年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州伊麗莎白 希迪享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thompson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

variants.name: Thomson
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thom
meanings: Scottish and English: from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me), a pet form of Thomas . In Scotland, Thom is also an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Thom, see McComb .
German: from the personal name Thom, a pet form of Thomas . This surname is also found in France.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 譚, see   Tan   1.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Thompson was born on 21 January 1598, in Walton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Thompson, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth Harsnett, was 28. She married Capt. William Tucker in 1617, in Jamestown, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1640, in Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Thompson est née le 21 janvier 1598, à Walton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Thompson, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Harsnett, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Capt. William Tucker en 1617, à Jamestown, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1640, à Elizabeth City, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Thompson am 21. Januar 1598 in Walton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Thompson 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Harsnett 28. Sie hat 1617 in Jamestown, Virginia, British Colonial America Capt. William Tucker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1640 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Colonial America.

Lei sposato Capt. William Tucker nel 1617, nel Jamestown, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ko.Jamestown, James City, Virginia, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 자메스타운

ko.Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 엘리자베스 시티
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Thompson(이)가 1598년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 월턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Thompson(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Harsnett(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1617년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 자메스타운에서 Capt. William Tucker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1640년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 엘리자베스 시티에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Thompson nasceu em 21 de janeiro de 1598, em Walton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Thompson, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Harsnett, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Capt. William Tucker em 1617, em Jamestown, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1640, em Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 42 anos.

ru.Sheston Chestnut, Watton-at-Stone, Hertf: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Coloni: элизабет сити, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Thompson родилась 21 января 1598 г. в местности валтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Thompson было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Harsnett, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Capt. William Tucker в 1617 г. в местности джеместоун, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1640 г. в местности элизабет сити, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Thompson nació el 21 de enero de 1598, en Walton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Thompson, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Harsnett, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Capt. William Tucker en 1617, en Jamestown, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1640, en Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 42 años.
